svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 04 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 04: Suffering Triangle and Gap Origin Analysis Map.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 04 Reference Images
Pain has stages: sensation → reaction → consequence → identity
Early pain is observable. Late pain becomes identity and culture.
The Suffering Triangle maps how far the pain has progressed.
Bottleneck = where the system is blocked, not where it hurts
• The useful pain is usually Important but Unfulfilled
• Gap: opportunity where important expectation is not met well enough
• Look at demand and supply together to find the bottleneck
• Pain Scoring Matrix: not every pain deserves a venture
• Observation-level vs validation-level pain — must distinguish
Important Unfulfilled — the phrase that separates real opportunity
from vanity problems. Look for it before naming a venture.
